listitem.para: What is meant by halakhah and what does it emphasize?
Name and describe at least three genetic conditions common among Jews.
What is meant by kashrut ? Distinguish between kosher and treyf.
What are the tenets of the four broad branches of Judaism? What are the primary differences among them?
When does Sabbath begin and end?
Under what conditions are observant Jews able to work?
What are some of the major principles that guide Judaic bioethics?
What is meant by shiva? Describe its practices.
An orthodox Jewish couple is expecting their first child. The expectant father wants to be in the delivery room with his wife. What preparations do you need to make for this to occur?
The hospital where you work does not have a kosher kitchen. Where might you purchase kosher meals? Once you have a kosher meal, how do you handle the food?
